name: Hit Point Dice
definition: Dice that determine a character's maximum hit points and can be spent during rest
full_text: Hit Point Dice, or Hit Dice for short, help determine a player character's Hit Point maximum, as explained in "Creating a Character". Most monsters also have Hit Dice. A creature can spend Hit Dice during a Short Rest to regain Hit Points.

mechanics.usage: Determines HP maximum; can spend during Short Rest to regain HP
